title: BEST INTEREST DECISION AFFIRMED
summary: Negotiated Land Sale – Big Lake MHT: 9200787 MH Parcels: SM-2000, SM-2001, SM-2002, SM-2003 Action: Adopt the Best Interest Decision dated June 24, 2024, regarding the above referenced disposal as final, without modification. This decision document, combined with the Best Interest Decision dated June 24, 2024, constitutes the final decision on this matter, in accordance with 11 AAC 99.040. Notice under 11 AAC 99.050 . title: Through Colonial Patterns of Extractivism: Self-Governance as a Sustainable Path Forward
summary: This article examines extractivism's impact on Indigenous self-governance and sustainable energy in the Arctic. The post Through Colonial Patterns of Extractivism: Self-Governance as a Sustainable Path Forward appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .
